findings.description: Footer text, a decorative page-break bar, and the full set of header names (PAT McCRORY/Governor, DONALD R. VAN DER VAART/Secretary, TRACY DAVIS/Director) are inserted between the letterhead header and the MEMORANDUM heading. In the PDF, the letterhead flows directly into the MEMORANDUM title on the same page with no intervening content.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 reading order: NC logo + right-aligned names → MEMORANDUM → date → To/From/Subject → body. HTML page 1 reading order: NC logo + right-aligned names → large blank → footer address block → colored bar → left-aligned names repeated → MEMORANDUM → date → To/From/Subject → body. The repeated header names and footer between the letterhead and memo content disrupt the visual reading sequence.
